350 J1100A_SOB_EXRTN_CD J1100A_SOB_EXRTN_CD J1100A Shortness of Breath With Exertion Code CHAR 1 The data in this column indicates whether the resident had shortness of breath with exertion (e.g., walking, bathing, transferring). -=Not assessed/no information
